StructurePhase.Reference: Espinosa, G. P., Cooper, A. S., Barz, H., Mater. Res. Bull., v17 #8 p963-969 (1982)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: N3O4P13. LPF Collection Code: 460288. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:Gd,Co,Sn. Compound Preparation: heated at 1323 K for 2 h in evacuated silica tube, slowly cooled. Article Title: ISOMORPHS OF THE SUPERCONDUCTING/MAGNETIC TERNARY STANNIDES. Wyckoff Sequence: k e c a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.

StructurePhase.Reference: Yan J.L., Xu Y., Long Q.X., Zhu J.M., Zhuang Y.H., J. Phase Equilib. Diffus. , v30 p435 (2009)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: NO. LPF Collection Code: 1823857. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS: Gd,Co,Sn. COMPOUND PREPARATION: arc-melted, re-melted. CRUCIBLE: water-cooled copper boat.ATMOSPHERE: argon.THERMALTREATMENT: annealed for 30 d, slowly cooled to 773 K, annealed at 773 K for 14 d in sealed evacuated quartz tube, quenched. Article Title: Isothermal section of the Co-Gd-Sn ternary system between 0 and 55 at.% Sn at 500 °C. Minor Warning: Minor warning from the LPF Editor exist. No R factors reported/abstracted. LPF Editor Comment: editor deduced probable site occupation from nominal composition. Wyckoff Sequence: f d a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.

StructurePhase.Reference: Gil A., Pene B., Wawrzynska E., Hernandez Velasco J., Szytula A., Zygmunt A., J. Alloys Compd., v365 p31-34 (2004)
StructurePhase.Comment: LPF Collection Code: 1120287. Sample Preparation: Compound Preparation: arc-melted, annealed at 1073 K for several d. ATMOSPHERE: argon. Article Title: Magnetic properties and magnetic structures of RCoxSn2 (R= Gd-Er) compounds. Minor Warning: 10%<R factor<15% (for powder). LPF Editor Comment: editor assigned an approximate value to the occupancy of site M based on the nominal composition. Wyckoff Sequence: c4. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.

StructurePhase.Reference: Brzakalik K., Acta Phys. Pol., A, v114 p1529-1536 (2008)
StructurePhase.Comment: LPF Collection Code: 1927697. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIAL: Fe,Sn. COMPOUND FORMATION: arc-melted. Article Title: Structural and magnetic properties of Fe3-xTixSn disordered alloys. Minor Warning: No R factors reported/abstracted. No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. Wyckoff Sequence: b. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
